top_comments.author: @pratikppm
top_comments.text: Almost all the hobby grade RC car sellers are scammers on amazon. First I ordered a 1:14 size car with Bldc motor for 7999 for which the sent a 1:18 size car with brushed motor and it wasn't even working. After returning it I ordered a 1:14 size car with brushed motor and instead of it I actually got a glass jar. The next cheapest option was the tygatech. I ordered from the seller directly. It was a legit car although the config was average.

top_comments.author: @goat_yt_555
top_comments.text: I also bought an very expensive toy car from soudhi but it's body is like hobby grade and there is an big space inside for placing an big motor but there is only a small 3v motor I got scammed😢

top_comments.author: @kamiandroidgames6752
top_comments.text:
I still miss my buddy  the Traxxas XO-1.
For 10 months, I saved every bit of my pocket money, stacking up $435 to finally buy a mint-condition used XO-1 online. Added $30 more for the battery… and the dream was real.

But sometimes life just throws you a twist. Out of jealousy, a friend crushed my happiness  literally  by running his bike over my RC car. 💔
That day, I didn’t just lose an RC car. I lost a friendship too.

Even today, whenever I see an XO-1 speeding, it reminds me of the bond I once had with mine  short-lived, but unforgettable. 🏎️⚡

channel_about: The Oval RC channel is all about fun. We feature RC cars, RC racing, RC drifting, Unboxing, Mudboss setup, RC bashing, RC crawling, and we have tips for the beginner. We feature events like RC drag racing and RC mud bog drag racing. The Oval RC is where you can find a recap of 12T Sportsman racing. Check out some of the fun interviews with our subscribers. Pick up a remote control car for a couple hours a week and have fun.#ovalrc

videos.title: Xmaxx vs Kraton | Drag race between 2 big RC trucks
videos.description:
#shorts RC drag race match up X-maxx vs Kraton

Two of the fastest remote control trucks go head to head in a drag race through the mud. The Traxxas X-maxx is known as one of the best 1/5 scale bashing trucks. The Arrma Kraton is also known as one of the 1/5 scale trucks. Both are fast and awesome to watch.

************************************************************

channel_about:
Multirotor and Drone enthusiast with a passion for FPV and all things RC. Lately I've been hooked on building and drifting Mini RC Cars of different scale sizes. I have 13 years of experience flying, tuning and building drones from scratch and love throwing FPV (First Person View) into everything. I also build and fly micro jets and helicopters, as well as micro cars and boats. This channel will mostly cover small R/C Drift Cars, showing videos on building, upgrading, drifting, racing and flying as much as I can. 
I also have my part 107 certification.

videos.title: BEST Remote Control Drift Car Unboxing and Review - Small RC Porsche
videos.description:
A Video Of a Small Porsche Remote Control Drift Car Quick Unboxing and Review By *UNBOX MSR*

Hello and welcome to *Unbox Msr!* In today’s video, we’re going to Unboxing a small 1: 24 Scale Porsche Drift car with replacement tiers. If you're interested in an rc car especially Drift then this video is for you.

An *RC drift car* is a specialized radio-controlled car designed to slide sideways (drift) through corners, mimicking the style of real-life drifting. These cars typically feature:  

- *Rear-wheel drive (RWD) or all-wheel drive (AWD)* setups for controlled slides.  
- *Slick or hard plastic tires* to reduce grip and enhance sliding.  
- *Adjustable suspension and steering* for precise control.  
- *Lightweight chassis* (often made of carbon fiber or high-grade plastic).  
- *Powerful brushless motors* for smooth acceleration.  

*What You'll Discover:*
- rc drift car Unboxing
- drift car Test and fun play
- fun With rc car
- some drifting moments
- quick unboxing and review 
- What's Inside The Drift car and remote
- Drifting and driving 

You Can Buy This Car From Ebay, Amazon, Alibaba, AliExpress, E-shops, Online, Facebook Page and many other place!

top_comments.author: @DD-k6o
top_comments.text:
Thank you for your video, particularly your tear-down (opening up). I believe this chassis is used for various models including the ZLL SG204 (Lancis Delta), SG216 (Ford Focus) and SG219 (Citroen). 

Your video shows that these chassis having full proportional throttle and steering is marketing nonsense, at best is two stage throttle/steering, i.e., off, half, full. 

I'm not saying it is bad or unsurprising given the price point of these cars, I just wish it wasn't so difficult to cut through the marketing exaggeration to find out exactly what features these cars have.

Still, really helpful of you, thank you.

Daddy Drones is India’s #1 Drone & RC Hobby Store, based in Mumbai and trusted by hobbyists across India. We offer drones, RC cars, crawlers, boats, planes, and hobby collectibles for beginners and pros.

videos.title: அசத்தலான Diecast Cars Shop in Chennai | Remote cars | Yours Randomly Shriram #tamil #diecastcars
videos.description:
Recently, I visited one of the best Die-Cast model shops in Chennai — and trust me, it was a paradise for every car enthusiast! 🏎✨

From F1 cars, premium die-cast models, and rare collectibles to RC cars, flights, and even remote helicopters — this place has it all. The detailing, variety, and the sheer vibe of the store make it a must-visit for anyone who loves scale models and automotive art.

It was such a fantastic experience exploring their massive collection — from tiny 1:64 Hot Wheels to large 1:18 scale models that look absolutely stunning! Whether you’re a collector, hobbyist, or just love cars, you’ll definitely enjoy visiting this spot.

📍 Location:
St. Thomas Avenue, No. 164/27A, East Coast Road, Cholamandal Artists Village, Injambakkam, Chennai, Tamil Nadu 600115

Whatsapp: 98840 66216

If you’re around ECR or South Chennai, make sure you drop by and check it out!

videos.title: Best Affordable RC Drift Car in India 🔥
videos.description:
Buying link in bio! 🔗

This is one of the best affordable RC drift cars you can buy in India. 

Just pop in the included rechargeable battery into the car, turn on the car and the remote, and that's it. You can start driving. You can turn the lights on or off, and it also has two speed modes so you can drive fast, and you can drive really fast as well. 

Plus, you get drift tires pre-installed on the car for drifting on smooth surfaces, and you also get grippy tires in the box which you can install easily to drive on rough surfaces or for drag racing with other RC cars.

It comes with proportional throttle and proportional steering so you can actually control your drift easily and it's a lot of fun to drive.

Check it out from the link in the bio! 

#8bittoast #toastyvideos
